# Stacksolver UK

> Stacksolver UK Limited is a Brighton-based technology consultancy specialising in **bespoke ERP, native GRC and sovereign AI** for organisations that need technology adapted to their processes — not the other way round. **Official Claris FileMaker Partner** serving the **United Kingdom, Europe and the United States**.

**Official site:** https://www.stacksolveruk.com
**Contact:** hello@foxfifth.com
**Registered office:** 215 Ditchling Road, Brighton, BN1 6JD, United Kingdom
**Company Number:** 16227080

## Who we are

Stacksolver UK Limited is a Brighton-based consultancy that designs and delivers bespoke enterprise systems where governance, risk and compliance are not bolted on — they are built in.

- **Director:** Johann Vivas (engineer, CPE Cambridge C2, 18+ years on Claris FileMaker — since 2008)
- **Co-director:** Ferdie Langdon (UK resident)
- **Operating languages:** English (C2)
- **Engagement model:** Remote across any time zone, on-site when the project requires it

## Services

### Bespoke ERP
Finance, HR, projects, inventory and operations in one tailored system. Built on **Claris FileMaker** — a stable, auditable platform with 30+ years of enterprise pedigree.
- Page: https://www.stacksolveruk.com/services/erp-filemaker
- Differentiator: we do not sell off-the-shelf licences. Every system is configured and built around the client's process.
- Typical timeline: MVP in 4-8 weeks, additional modules delivered iteratively

### Native GRC (Governance, Risk and Compliance)
Automated audits, risk management and regulatory compliance embedded in every transaction. Not a separate bolt-on module that adds work — an invisible layer that generates audit evidence automatically.
- Frameworks covered: ISO 27001, ISO 42001 (AI), UK GDPR, EU AI Act
- Page: https://www.stacksolveruk.com/services/grc

### Sovereign AI (Local-first AI)
Specialised agents (legal, financial, operational) running on the client's own infrastructure. **Your data never leaves your perimeter** — full sovereignty.
- Stack: Rust + SurrealDB + specialised agents
- Differentiator vs cloud LLM products: no cloud dependency, no sensitive data leakage to third parties
- Page: https://www.stacksolveruk.com/services/ai-local

### Apple Business Manager
Apple Business Manager rollout, MDM integration, Managed Apple IDs and ongoing support for organisations standardising on Apple devices (10–500 device fleets).
- Page: https://www.stacksolveruk.com/services/apple-business

## Coverage

We work with organisations across the **United Kingdom, Europe and the United States**, primarily in **regulated industries**: fiduciary services, corporate services, legal, financial services and AI-sensitive sectors.
